audit_items.proof_trace: `getDepthFormat()` returns `freenect_depth_format` by value — a `typedef enum` (32-bit integer, defined in `include/libfreenect.h:99-107`), not a pointer. Enum values cannot be NULL in C/C++, so NULL-checking the return value is neither possible nor necessary. No callers in the C++ codebase dereference it.
